description: CompositionWhite and brown check shirt made of 100% cotton, has long fold-over sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a tipped collar, a patch pocket on the left chest with a buttoned placket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThe classic appeal of natural fabrics combined with vintage cuts is back with a vengeance.
